'''Dorsis''' was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] sometimes referred to as "Mini-Coruscant."<ref name="SoF" />

==History==
Dorsis was [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] long ago by [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]] sent out in [[Sleeper ship/Legends|sleeper ships]] and was quickly developed into a near-[[Ecumenopolis/Legends|Ecumenopolis]] with most of its natural landscape covered with industrial centers and urban sprawls. The planet's main export and basis of economy was in quickly and inexpensively made general consumer goods. Dorsis supplied the majority of consumer outlets that catered to low-income families and individuals throughout the Corellian sector.<ref name="SoF" />

It was on Dorsis that [[Hal Horn]] once tracked down [[Moranda Savich]].<ref name="Darkknell">{{StoryCite|story=Interlude at Darkknell|book=Tales from the New Republic}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
